_comment: Hand-curated one-line description overrides, keyed by the mod's resolved display NAME (same name shown in the README Mods table). These BEAT the jar's mods.toml/fabric.mod.json description. Use only where the jar description is empty, a placeholder/joke, or has leaked formatting. Everything else is auto-extracted from the jar by build_readme_credits.py and needs no entry here. Verified 2026-06-21.
Biomantic Delight: Farmer's Delight addon — dishes themed around Biomancy's flesh ingredients.
Sinytra Connector: Runs Fabric mods on Forge; here it loads the pack's Fabric-only map mods.
Gabou's Libs: Shared library code for Gabou's mods.
Kotlin For Forge: Kotlin language runtime and adapter for Forge mods.
MmmMmmMmmMmm: Adds a target dummy for testing weapons, damage, and redstone.
Player Animator: Library for playing custom keyframe player animations.
